12],[386,561,1776530231126],[374,553,1776530231137],[362,545,1776530231150],[351,537,1776530231161],[341,530,1776530231173],[333,524,1776530231188],[325,519,1776530231202],[319,514,1776530231215],[314,511,1776530231230],[311,508,1776530231245],[309,506,1776530231261],[308,505,1776530231278],[307,505,1776530231298],[306,506,1776530231306],[305,506,1776530231323],[304,507,1776530231332],[303,508,1776530231351],[302,509,1776530231366],[301,509,1776530231378],[302,508,1776530231394],[303,506,1776530231405],[304,505,1776530231417],[305,504,1776530231430],[306,502,1776530231445],[307,502,1776530231450],[308,500,1776530231457],[307,500,1776530231482],[306,500,1776530231494],[305,499,1776530231507],[304,499,1776530231528],[303,499,1776530231540],[302,498,1776530231551],[301,498,1776530231562],[300,498,1776530231571],[299,497,1776530231584]],"mm-mp":18.7590799031477,"md":[[301,509,1776530231383]],"md-mp":3387.0,"mu":[[301,509,1776530231486]],"mu-mp":3397.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
